name: t16_ablation_v1

experiments.label: Residual FNO
experiments.purpose: Reference architecture and loss from the verified smoke checkpoint.

experiments.label: Absolute-output FNO
experiments.purpose: Ablate the residual skip while retaining the same calibrated physics-lift input.

experiments.label: FNO without reprojection loss
experiments.purpose: Test whether the differentiable BOST consistency term changes field and held-out behavior.

experiments.label: Parameter-matched U-Net
experiments.purpose: Compare local convolutions and spectral mixing at a closer trainable-parameter budget.

interpretation_contract.negative_delta: The challenger has lower error than residual FNO.
interpretation_contract.uncertainty: Student-t 95% intervals across three optimization seeds; low power and not a dataset bootstrap.
interpretation_contract.absolute_fno: Ablates the residual skip only. It still receives the calibrated physics lift as channel zero.
interpretation_contract.matched_unet: Closer parameter budget, but not an architecture-identical control.

claims_boundary: The dataset is fixed; seed intervals measure optimization variation, not phantom-population uncertainty.
Three seeds provide a stability check but weak inferential power.
No raw-projection encoder is implemented, so this does not compare against a direct measurement-to-volume operator.
The synthetic linear stack remains a controlled surrogate rather than the full OERF BOST geometry.
No temporal or four-dimensional operator is trained in this ablation.
